policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-srch-01 - Disable local authentication methods'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+AI+Search#IncidentremediationAISearch#drcp-srch-01 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AI Search Disable local authentication methods
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents AI Search instances from using local authentication methods. Disabling local authentication methods improves security by ensuring that Azure AI Search services require Entra ID identities for authentication.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
